<?php namespace Faker\Provider\sk_SK; class Internet extends \Faker\Provider\Internet { protected static $freeEmailDomain = ['gmail.com', 'yahoo.com', 'zoznam.sk', 'atlas.sk', 'centrum.sk', 'azet.sk', 'post.sk']; protected static $tld = ['sk', 'sk', 'sk', 'sk', 'sk', 'sk', 'eu', 'com', 'info', 'net', 'org']; }
